## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations, etc.
